# UC-17.6.2 · Akamai Guardicore Lateral Movement Between Segments (`guardicore:network`)

## Description

Cross-segment flows that bypass intended choke points warrant investigation even when not yet blocked.

## Value

Reduces blast radius during active intrusions.

## Implementation

Install the add-on, configure API polling intervals appropriate to API limits, and map assets to CMDB for enrichment lookups.

## SPL

```spl
index=microseg sourcetype="guardicore:network" earliest=-24h
| where src_segment!=dst_segment
| stats count by src_segment, dst_segment, process_name
| where count>=20
| sort -count
```

## CIM SPL

```spl
| tstats `summariesonly` count
  from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic
  by All_Traffic.user, All_Traffic.action, All_Traffic.src, All_Traffic.dest span=1h
| sort - count
```

## Visualization

Chord diagram (segments), table.

## References

- [Splunkbase — Akamai Guardicore Add-on for Splunk](https://splunkbase.splunk.com/app/7426)
- [Akamai Guardicore documentation](https://www.akamai.com/products/guardicore)
